mapper.sql: compID, compCode, compName, compAbbr, adminID, compGrade, compType, compArea, effectDate, lawyer, address, regAddress, tel, fax, postCode, webSite, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_company (compCode, compName, compAbbr, adminID, compGrade, compType, compArea, effectDate, lawyer, address, regAddress, tel, fax, postCode, webSite, isDisabled, disabledDate, remark ) values (#{compCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{compGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{compType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{compArea,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lawyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{webSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into ehr_company
compCode,
compName,
compAbbr,
adminID,
compGrade,
compType,
compArea,
effectDate,
lawyer,
address,
regAddress,
tel,
fax,
postCode,
webSite,
isDisabled,
disabledDate,
remark,

mapper.update:
update ehr_company
compCode = #{compCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compName = #{compName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compAbbr = #{compAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
compGrade = #{compGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER},
compType = #{compType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
compArea = #{compArea,jdbcType=INTEGER},
effectDate = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
lawyer = #{lawyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
regAddress = #{regAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fax = #{fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postCode = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
webSite = #{webSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT},
disabledDate = #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update ehr_company set compCode = #{compCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compName = #{compName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compAbbr = #{compAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, compGrade = #{compGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, compType = #{compType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, compArea = #{compArea,jdbcType=INTEGER}, effectDate = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, lawyer = #{lawyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regAddress = #{regAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fax = #{fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, postCode = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, webSite = #{webSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isDisabled = #{isDisabled,jdbcType=BIT}, disabledDate = #{disabledDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from ehr_company
compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compAbbr = #{compAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminID = #{adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compGrade = #{compGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compType = #{compType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compArea = #{compArea, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
lawyer = #{lawyer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
address = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
regAddress = #{regAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fax = #{fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
postCode = #{postCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
webSite = #{webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

select count(1) from ehr_company
compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compAbbr = #{compAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminID = #{adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compGrade = #{compGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compType = #{compType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compArea = #{compArea, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
lawyer = #{lawyer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
address = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
regAddress = #{regAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fax = #{fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
postCode = #{postCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
webSite = #{webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

select * from ehr_company
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{model.compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compAbbr = #{model.compAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compGrade = #{model.compGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compType = #{model.compType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compArea = #{model.compArea, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
lawyer = #{model.lawyer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
address = #{model.address, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
regAddress = #{model.regAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{model.tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fax = #{model.fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
postCode = #{model.postCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
webSite = #{model.webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
( compCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or lawyer like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or address like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or regAddress like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or fax like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or postCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or webSite like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from ehr_company
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{model.compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compAbbr = #{model.compAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compGrade = #{model.compGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compType = #{model.compType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compArea = #{model.compArea, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
effectDate = #{model.effectDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
lawyer = #{model.lawyer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
address = #{model.address, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
regAddress = #{model.regAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{model.tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fax = #{model.fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
postCode = #{model.postCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
webSite = #{model.webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
isDisabled = #{model.isDisabled, jdbcType=BIT} AND
disabledDate = #{model.disabledDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
( compCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or lawyer like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or address like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or regAddress like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or fax like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or postCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or webSite like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
